title: Orthoptists
description: Diagnose and treat visual system disorders such as binocular vision and eye movement impairments.

tasks.text: Examine patients with problems related to ocular motility, binocular vision, amblyopia, or strabismus.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate, diagnose, or treat disorders of the visual system with an emphasis on binocular vision or abnormal eye movements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide instructions to patients or family members concerning diagnoses or treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform diagnostic tests or measurements, such as motor testing, visual acuity testing, lensometry, retinoscopy, and color vision testing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide nonsurgical interventions, including corrective lenses, patches, drops, fusion exercises, or stereograms, to treat conditions such as strabismus, heterophoria, and convergence insufficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop nonsurgical treatment plans for patients with conditions such as strabismus, nystagmus, and other visual disorders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret clinical or diagnostic test results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or use special test and communication techniques to facilitate diagnosis and treatment of children or patients with disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide training related to clinical methods or orthoptics to students, resident physicians, or other health professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer patients to ophthalmic surgeons or other physicians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare diagnostic or treatment reports for other medical practitioners or therapists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with ophthalmologists, optometrists, or other specialists in the diagnosis, treatment, or management of conditions such as glaucoma, cataracts, and retinal diseases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform vision screening of children in schools or community health centers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist ophthalmologists in diagnostic ophthalmic procedures, such as ultrasonography, fundus photography, and tonometry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
